message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title uc2_6活动执行时序图

actor "管理员" as admin1
participant "web" as web1
participant "sever" as sever1
database "活动快照表" as snapshot1
database "活动结果表" as result1

admin1 -down- admin1
web1 -down- web1
sever1 -down- sever1
snapshot1 -down- snapshot1
result1 -down- result1

actor "管理员" as admin2
participant "web" as web2
participant "sever" as sever2
database "活动快照表" as snapshot2
database "活动结果表" as result2

@enduml
```
